headline: Paramount Skydance weighs selling kids networks to clear EU fears - Bloomberg
summary: Investing.com -- Paramount Skydance Corp (NASDAQ:PSKY) is prepared to divest some of its children’s television network assets in an effort to secure European Union approval for its $110 billion acquisition of Warner Bros Discovery Inc (NASDAQ:WBD). The media conglomerate is hoping to avoid any asset sales but remains open to sacrificing specific kids channels if European regulators flag antitrust concerns, according to reporting from Bloomberg, citing people familiar with the matter.

headline: Assessing Warner Bros. Discovery (WBD) Valuation After A Strong One Year Rebound
summary: Recent performance snapshot Warner Bros. Discovery (WBD) has drawn investor attention after a period of mixed share performance, with the stock down about 3% over the past month and roughly 6% over the past 3 months, but showing a 167% total return over the past year. See our latest analysis for Warner Bros. Discovery. With the share price down over the past week and quarter, but the 1 year total shareholder return at about 167%, recent weakness looks more like a pause after a strong rebound...
